posts.text: US markets are tanking todayрҹҮәрҹҮёвӨөпёҸin a flight to cashрҹ’°as #oil prices spikeрҹҳұwith #Trump's 'forever war' plunging US & global economies into uncertaintyрҹ”ҘрҹҢҚ but dip buyers are grabbing #Uranium #stocks at deeply oversold levelsвҷҲпёҸрҹӣ’рҹҳҠ amid extremely bullish #Nuclear outlook!рҹ“ҲвҡӣпёҸрҹҗӮрҹӨ
